3. Tiền thu từ đi vay
4. Tiền trả nợ gốc vay
5. Tiền chi trả nợ gốc thuê tài chính
6. Cổ tức, lợi nhuận đã trả cho chủ sở hữu

Khong tim thay muc con nao cua "TS dai han" (dong "cap 2" I/II/III...) - khong kiem tra duoc tong cac muc con.
Khong tim thay dong: No phai tra, Von chu so huu, Tong cong nguon von - khong kiem tra duoc dang thuc "No phai tra + Von chu so huu = Tong cong nguon von".
Khong tim thay dong "No phai tra" - khong kiem tra duoc tong cac muc con.
Khong tim thay dong "Von chu so huu" - khong kiem tra duoc tong cac muc con.
Khong tim thay dong: Gia von hang ban, Loi nhuan gop - khong kiem tra duoc "Loi nhuan gop = Doanh thu thuan - Gia von".
Khong tim thay dong: Loi nhuan sau thue - khong kiem tra duoc "Loi nhuan sau thue = Loi nhuan truoc thue - Chi phi thue TNDN".

warnings: Khong tim thay dong "Tong cong tai san" va/hoac "Tong cong nguon von" - khong kiem tra cheo duoc, can xem tay.
Khong tim thay dong: TS ngan han, TS dai han, Tong cong tai san - khong kiem tra duoc dang thuc "TS ngan han + TS dai han = Tong cong tai san".
Khong tim thay dong "TS ngan han" - khong kiem tra duoc tong cac muc con.
Khong tim thay dong "TS dai han" - khong kiem tra duoc tong cac muc con.
Khong tim thay dong: No phai tra, Von chu so huu, Tong cong nguon von - khong kiem tra duoc dang thuc "No phai tra + Von chu so huu = Tong cong nguon von".
Khong tim thay dong "No phai tra" - khong kiem tra duoc tong cac muc con.
Khong tim thay dong "Von chu so huu" - khong kiem tra duoc tong cac muc con.
Khong tim thay dong: Doanh thu thuan, Gia von hang ban, Loi nhuan gop - khong kiem tra duoc "Loi nhuan gop = Doanh thu thuan - Gia von".
Khong tim thay dong: Loi nhuan truoc thue, Chi phi thue TNDN, Loi nhuan sau thue - khong kiem tra duoc "Loi nhuan sau thue = Loi nhuan truoc thue - Chi phi thue TNDN".

warnings: Khong tim thay dong "Tong cong tai san" va/hoac "Tong cong nguon von" - khong kiem tra cheo duoc, can xem tay.
Khong tim thay dong: TS ngan han, TS dai han, Tong cong tai san - khong kiem tra duoc dang thuc "TS ngan han + TS dai han = Tong cong tai san".
Khong tim thay dong "TS ngan han" - khong kiem tra duoc tong cac muc con.
Khong tim thay dong "TS dai han" - khong kiem tra duoc tong cac muc con.
Khong tim thay dong: No phai tra, Von chu so huu, Tong cong nguon von - khong kiem tra duoc dang thuc "No phai tra + Von chu so huu = Tong cong nguon von".
Khong tim thay dong "No phai tra" - khong kiem tra duoc tong cac muc con.
Khong tim thay dong "Von chu so huu" - khong kiem tra duoc tong cac muc con.
Khong tim thay dong: Doanh thu thuan, Gia von hang ban, Loi nhuan gop - khong kiem tra duoc "Loi nhuan gop = Doanh thu thuan - Gia von".
Khong tim thay dong: Loi nhuan truoc thue, Chi phi thue TNDN, Loi nhuan sau thue - khong kiem tra duoc "Loi nhuan sau thue = Loi nhuan truoc thue - Chi phi thue TNDN".

warnings: Khong tim thay dong "Tong cong tai san" va/hoac "Tong cong nguon von" - khong kiem tra cheo duoc, can xem tay.
Khong tim thay dong: TS ngan han, TS dai han, Tong cong tai san - khong kiem tra duoc dang thuc "TS ngan han + TS dai han = Tong cong tai san".
Khong tim thay dong "TS ngan han" - khong kiem tra duoc tong cac muc con.
Khong tim thay dong "TS dai han" - khong kiem tra duoc tong cac muc con.
Khong tim thay dong: No phai tra, Von chu so huu, Tong cong nguon von - khong kiem tra duoc dang thuc "No phai tra + Von chu so huu = Tong cong nguon von".
Khong tim thay dong "No phai tra" - khong kiem tra duoc tong cac muc con.
Khong tim thay dong "Von chu so huu" - khong kiem tra duoc tong cac muc con.
Khong tim thay dong: Doanh thu thuan, Gia von hang ban, Loi nhuan gop - khong kiem tra duoc "Loi nhuan gop = Doanh thu thuan - Gia von".
Khong tim thay dong: Loi nhuan truoc thue, Chi phi thue TNDN, Loi nhuan sau thue - khong kiem tra duoc "Loi nhuan sau thue = Loi nhuan truoc thue - Chi phi thue TNDN".
